APPEARANCES: Donald Mah, Esq. of Law Offices of Donald Mah 650/755-8601 for pltf & opposing party; Erin Chiari, Esq. of Barulich Dugoni Law Group, Inc. 650/292-2900 for moving party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. In addition, the parties stipulate to consolidate cases #461824, #461825, #461826 & #461828 for all purposes with the lead case number as #461824. Counsel to prepare a stipulation & order.
